members.description: List of member objects with email and role

memberEmails.description: Flat list of member emails, derived from members[]. Firestore security rules read this to check org membership — always keep in sync via lib/permissions.js buildMemberFields(), never write members[] directly.

memberRoles.description: Map of email -> role, derived from members[]. Lets security rules check a specific user's role without array iteration (not supported in rules). Kept in sync via lib/permissions.js buildMemberFields().
